reason: Accounts configured for password authentication without an assigned password allow login without authentication. Remediation script applicable only on certain platforms; if authselect check fails, remediation aborts due to missing or incomplete authselect profile. Manual edit of PAM files not recommended when authselect tool available; default authselect profile may not cover specific demand, requiring custom authselect profile.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; empty password; PAM misconfiguration
